parameters.query: SELECT * FROM job_postings WHERE id = $1 LIMIT 1

INSERT INTO processed_jobs (job_id, simplified_jd, extracted_keywords, core_skills, tools_technologies, responsibilities, hidden_expectations, ats_keywords, skill_match_score, match_breakdown)
VALUES ($1, $2, $3::jsonb, $4::jsonb, $5::jsonb, $6::jsonb, $7, $8::jsonb, $9, $10::jsonb)
ON CONFLICT (job_id) DO UPDATE SET
  simplified_jd = EXCLUDED.simplified_jd,
  skill_match_score = EXCLUDED.skill_match_score,
  match_breakdown = EXCLUDED.match_breakdown,
  processed_at = NOW()
RETURNING id, skill_match_score
UPDATE job_postings SET is_processed = true WHERE id = $1
INSERT INTO system_log (workflow, action, data, status) VALUES ($1, $2, $3::jsonb, $4)

parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ success: true, job_id: $('Parse & Score Match').item.json.job_id, score: $('Parse & Score Match').item.json.skill_match_score }) }}
